word_data.example_en: The artist decided to create a new painting for the exhibition.
word_data.example_jp: そのアーティストは展示会のために新しい絵を作ることに決めました。

metadata.text: Anna had always wanted to create something meaningful. One sunny afternoon, she decided to start her own garden in the small yard behind her house. She planted colorful flowers and fresh herbs, carefully arranging them so they all had enough sunlight. As the weeks passed, the garden began to bloom beautifully. Neighbors would often stop by to admire her work and ask for advice. Anna felt proud and content. Her little garden had not only brought beauty to her home but also inspired others in her community to start their own.

Anna had always wanted to create something meaningful. One sunny afternoon, she decided to start her own garden in the small yard behind her house. She planted colorful flowers and fresh herbs, carefully arranging them so they all had enough sunlight. As the weeks passed, the garden began to bloom beautifully. Neighbors would often stop by to admire her work and ask for advice. Anna felt proud and content. Her little garden had not only brought beauty to her home but also inspired others in her community to start their own.
